units.name: MktOff namespace (offset block)
units.role: All reverse-engineered offsets/addresses for the marketplace: CMarketplaceWnd ptr, CreateCats/RenderCats fns, node/CXStr/tile/grid/tree field offsets, tile factory + icon-anim fns, vtable slot indices, tree leaf/branch vtables.

units.name: Marketplace banner comment
units.role: Section header documenting the MARKETPLACE HYBRID design + key RE'd addresses; marks the start of the marketplace block.

units.name: MktRenameCategory
units.role: Rewrite a category node's internal-name CXStr in place and mark it non-empty so it renders.

units.name: MktMakeNode
units.role: Build one category tree node via the client's own ctor (folder/leaf), auto-linking children to a parent.

units.name: MktAddBranch
units.role: Add a top-level category with nested child leaves, appending the parent node to the window's category array.

units.name: MktAddGearBranch forward decl
units.role: Forward declaration of the data-driven gear-leaf branch builder (defined after g_mktItems).

units.name: MktPopulate
units.role: Top-level category-tree builder: grows the array, hides 2 native defaults, and adds every BOZ branch (Cross-Class Spells/Skills/Discs, Augments, Soul Grafting, Currency Exchange, Racial Arts, 4 Gear tiers, Non-Raid Gear, Ornaments, Mounts, Robe/Armor/Velious ornaments), then re-renders.

units.name: Mkt pointer-safety forward decls
units.role: Forward decls for MktReadable/MktExecutable/MktTileLooksValid (defined just below).

units.name: MktFindChild
units.role: Helper: find a named child control inside a tile via the engine find-child fn.

units.name: MktSetChildText
units.role: Helper: set a tile child label's text via CXWnd::SetWindowText vtable call.

units.name: MktSetWidgetText
units.role: Helper: set a widget's text directly when the caller already holds the pointer.

units.name: MktHideChild
units.role: Helper: hide a tile child control (SetVisible false).

units.name: MktReadable
units.role: Pointer-safety guard: VirtualQuery a region is committed/readable for a given size.

units.name: MktExecutable
units.role: Pointer-safety guard: a pointer points at committed executable code.

units.name: MktTileLooksValid
units.role: Pointer-safety guard: a node looks like a live tile (readable self+vtable, SetVisible slot is real code).

units.name: MktSafeSetVisible
units.role: Validated SetVisible on a tile (guards against half-built/freed vtables).

units.name: MktSafeHide
units.role: One-liner: MktSafeSetVisible(wnd,0).

units.name: MktSafeRelayout
units.role: Validated grid relayout via the layout vtable method.

units.name: MktHideAllTiles
units.role: Clear the item grid by hiding every child tile, validated against freed nodes.

units.name: MktItem struct
units.role: The cached catalog-row record (parent/subcat/item_id/name/icon/price/currency/level/desc + preview model/pslot/color).

units.name: g_mktItems / count / collecting globals
units.role: [BOZ_MKT] feed cache: g_mktItems[4000], g_mktItemCount, g_mktCollecting.

units.name: g_mktView / g_mktViewN
units.role: Items gathered for the currently-selected leaf (rebuilt on category change).

units.name: MktAddGearBranch
units.role: Build a gear-tier parent's slot leaves DATA-DRIVEN from the live g_mktItems cache (fallback list if feed not yet loaded).

units.name: g_mktPlayerLevel
units.role: Player level from [BOZ_MKT_LEVEL]; drives the 'My Level and Below' tab.

units.name: g_mktSouls/Conquest/Raid/FundsValid
units.role: Player currency balances from [BOZ_FUNDS]; drive the funds display morph.

units.name: Marketplace WndNotif/buy/selection globals
units.role: Click-to-buy state: g_origMktWndNotif, g_mktVtableCopy, hooked-wnd, Buy/Inspect btn ptrs, selection idx/itemid, highlight label, funds widgets, MKT_MAX_TILES.

units.name: MktStrip
units.role: Helper: strip leading sort-space / tree-glyph chars from a leaf label.

units.name: MktLookupCategory
units.role: Gather cached items for the selected parent+subcat into g_mktView ('My Level and Below' special case sorts by level).

units.name: g_mktFilledCat / g_mktFilledN / g_mktDone
units.role: Per-frame tile-fill progress state for the displayed category.

units.name: g_mktIconAnim + MktItemIconAnim
units.role: Per-tile private copy of the A_DragItem icon atlas (FindAnimation+ctor+copy) so each tile shows its own item icon.

units.name: MktFillOneTile
units.role: Fill one tile (show, label/price/icon, hide sale decorations), SEH-guarded; returns false to retry if children not built yet.

units.name: MktTickTiles
units.role: Per-frame two-phase tile maintenance for the selected leaf: phase1 make one tile/frame, phase2 fill from g_mktView, hide extras, relayout.

units.name: MktGridIndexOf
units.role: Map a clicked grid-child widget to its tile index (== g_mktView index).

units.name: Mkt tick forward decls + populate-state globals
units.role: Forward decls (SendServerCommand, InstallMktVTableHook) + g_mktPopulated/Requested/NeedRepop/LastSel state used by TickMarketplace.

units.name: TickMarketplace
units.role: Per-frame marketplace driver (called from MyHook_PwDraw): open/close reset, populate tree once, request #mkt catalog, install per-instance WndNotif hook, force-enable Buy/Inspect, read tree selection, drive MktTickTiles, re-gold the selection, morph funds display, fill detail pane. SEH-wrapped.

units.name: ParseBozMkt
units.role: Parse one [BOZ_MKT]| catalog row into g_mktItems (incl. optional trailing model/pslot/color preview fields).

units.name: MyHook_PwDraw (per-frame draw hook)
units.role: CPlayerWnd::Draw trampoline hook. Shared: also forces melee MP-bar widgets visible (2027-2039), calls TickCycleHeader (2044, Node Fight) and AcFlushPendingFromMainThread (2052, anti-cheat). MARKETPLACE part = the single call TickMarketplace() at line 2047.

units.name: MyHook_DspChat (chat hook)
units.role: CEverQuest::dsp_chat trampoline hook parsing [BOZ_*] tags. Shared: handles SPELL_UNLOCK/ARMORORN/MAXMANA/SKILL_GRANTS/SKILL_MIRROR/NODE_ACCESS/OPEN_WINDOW/NODES/NODE/CYCLE/SOUL_BANK/SLOTS (non-marketplace). MARKETPLACE branches: [BOZ_MKT_START] 3810-3814, [BOZ_MKT_LEVEL] 3815-3818, [BOZ_MKT_END] 3819-3825, [BOZ_MKT] (-> ParseBozMkt) 3826-3829, [BOZ_FUNDS] 3830-3843.

units.name: Marketplace 3D preview section header
units.role: Comment header documenting the native paper-doll preview machinery used by the marketplace preview functions.

units.name: Mkt preview typedefs
units.role: Function-pointer typedefs for the preview path (paper-doll, set-weapon, appearance-apply, set-preview, actor-reap).

units.name: Mkt preview state globals
units.role: g_mktPreviewLastId / g_mktPreviewBusy debounce + g_mktPreviewEnabled toggle.

units.name: MktRenderCloneBareRebuild
units.role: Bare-rebuild preview over worn gear: save+bare render slots, CreatePlayerActor, paper-doll clone, ArmorOrn::PreviewApply repaint, __finally restore. (Depends on ArmorOrn::PreviewApply.)

units.name: MktRenderClone
units.role: Render the preview clone wearing model on slot ps: routes full-suit/robe to bare-rebuild, else pokes render arrays + tint, paper-dolls, __finally restores.

units.name: g_mktRobeHintShown + MktMaybeHint
units.role: One-time chat hint when previewing chest armor under an equipped robe (uses g_orig_DspChat directly).

units.name: MktShowPreview
units.role: Entry point: render the local avatar in the preview pane wearing the selected item (or bare), debounced; called from the WndNotif tile-select branch.

units.name: MyHook_MktWndNotification (marketplace WndNotification hook)
units.role: Per-instance vtable[34] hook on CMarketplaceWnd. Entirely marketplace: Buy button -> #mktbuy + swallow (4981-4989); Inspect button -> #mktview + swallow (4994-5002); tile-select code 0x20 -> record selection, set detail name, MktShowPreview, highlight (5007-5035); else delegates to g_origMktWndNotif.

units.name: InstallMktVTableHook
units.role: Install the marketplace WndNotif hook: copy the window's vtable, swap slot 34 to MyHook_MktWndNotification, repoint wnd[0].

notes:
FILE: C:/BOZ-Client-RoF2/src/dllmain_rof2.cpp (6365 lines).

CARVE-OUT GUIDANCE / GOTCHAS:

1) The prompt's landmark "marketplace WndNotification hook (g_origMktWndNotif) ~6119-6189" is WRONG. Lines 6119-6195 are ArmorOrn::RefreshWornSlot/PreviewApply/Install (namespace ArmorOrn, 5996-6195) -- NOT marketplace. The REAL marketplace WndNotif hook is MyHook_MktWndNotification at 4975-5037 (install 5039-5066), declared with globals at 2737-2750.

2) The dsp_chat hook is MyHook_DspChat (3679-3907), NOT near line 284. Line 284 is just a comment describing the dsp_chat signature inside the Off namespace. It is a shared_fork: only 5 branches are marketplace ([BOZ_MKT_START/LEVEL/END/MKT/FUNDS], lines 3810-3843). InstallHook_DspChat (3909-~3965) installs it and is shared (also drives Node Fight, spells, armor, etc.) -- left out of marketplace_only.

3) MyHook_PwDraw (2022-2055) is shared_fork: ONLY line 2047 (TickMarketplace();) is marketplace. The rest (melee MP-bar fix, TickCycleHeader, AcFlushPendingFromMainThread) is non-marketplace. InstallHook_PwDraw (2057-2106) is shared.

SHARED DEPENDENCIES the carve-out MUST also provide (NOT marketplace-only, used by other systems too -- do not move them, replicate/share them):
  - Off namespace (starts line 23): holds the shared Resolve base + MANY marketplace-preview offsets at 478-517 (FnViewportSetModel, GblPreviewSubject 486, GblCDisplay 487, FnDisplayActorCleanup 493, FnPaperDollPreview 507, FnSetWeaponSlot 508, FnAppearanceApply 514, GblEngine 517) AND FnCreatePlayerActor (462). These preview offsets live in the SHARED Off namespace, not MktOff -- the carve-out needs them.
  - Resolve() at 566; IsReadable; Log namespace (529+).
  - SendServerCommand (definition at 4239-~4270) -- shared with Node Fight; marketplace calls it for #mkt/#mktbuy/#mktview.
  - CopyField (3125-3134) -- shared by ParseBozMkt AND ParseBozNode; marketplace's ParseBozMkt + the [BOZ_FUNDS] branch call it.
  - ArmorOrn::PreviewApply (6144-6149) -- called by MktRenderCloneBareRebuild/MktRenderClone for full-suit/armor repaint; lives in namespace ArmorOrn.
  - g_orig_DspChat / g_dspChatThis -- MktMaybeHint emits the robe hint through g_orig_DspChat directly.

NON-MARKETPLACE code interleaved INSIDE the marketplace line-range (do NOT carve): CopyField (3125-3134), ParseBozNode (3138-3156), and everything from 3187 (SetListRowColor) through 3678 (Node Fight listbox/time-pick/ConstructProbe/spell-table). TickCycleHeader (2264-2282) and the SendServerCommand fwd-decl (2252) just before the marketplace banner are Node Fight.

FORWARD DECLS for marketplace symbols also appear at: 2020 (TickMarketplace fwd), 2966-2967 (SendServerCommand + InstallMktVTableHook fwds). These are inside marketplace-related contexts and listed.
